content.en:
A lifelike spirit puppet appeared in front of Ye Tian, exuding an aura comparable to a half-step extradimensional realm, and it was not an ordinary extradimensional realm, and it was also powerful in the extradimensional realm.

It's a pity that he didn't comprehend the extradimensional rules, otherwise using the extradimensional rules to refine the spirit puppet of the half-step extradimensional realm would be comparable to the top half-step extradimensional realm.

"The Terrans now have no half-step extra-dimensional realm except for me, and with the spirit puppets of the half-step extra-dimensional realm, they can sit in the territory of the human race, and they can save the lives of many human beings at critical moments!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Terran of the 7362nd Territory, he can keep it himself, but the Terran of other realms, he can't come over in time, with a half-step spirit puppet of the Transcendent Realm, it will be much safer.

If he had refined a spirit puppet of the extradimensional realm in the future, it would have been even safer.

Next, Ye Tian refined one after another half-step spirit puppets of the transcendent realm, and then sent these spirit puppets to the Terran temples of the territory of the whole territory, and sent a number of peak realm god guardian spirit puppets, and only in special circumstances can the spirit puppets be mobilized to fight.

After a period of time, all Terran branches had half-step extradimensional realm spirit golems to sit in.

"The next goal is to refine the extra-dimensional body to 100 percent, impact the extra-dimensional realm, and 360 is to try to comprehend the extra-dimensional rules!"

Breaking through the transcendent realm and comprehending the extradimensional rules is the most important thing for Ye Tian at present.

And his extradimensional body has been tempered to ninety-one percent, and it is very difficult to continue refining.

Relying only on ordinary resources, he found that the progress was minimal, and it was difficult for an extradimensional era to refine one percent of the progress.

Of course, if he relied on time to cultivate slowly, he would definitely be able to break through to success in a hundred extradimensional eras.

But he didn't want to wait that long for a hundred extradimensional eras.

He knew very well that the Eternal Boundary Sea was very dangerous, and the Six-Winged Family could send a strong person to collect the Extradimensional Origin Bead at any time.

If by that time, he has not yet reached the extradimensional realm, then the Six-Winged Family will not give face.

Only the extradimensional realm is qualified to let the Six-Winged Family let go of the eternal realm.

"If I follow the normal path, I won't be able to refine my extradimensional body to 100% in a short period of time, and there is only one way now!"

Ye Tian's method was to plunder the Transcendental Origin Beads, and the Six-Winged Family was able to use the Transcendental Realms to cultivate the Transcendental Origin Beads, and other forces would definitely do the same.

(caaa) And in the information given by the Sky Pavilion at the beginning, it was recorded that there were many extra-dimensional realms that cultivated super-dimensional origin beads, but they all belonged to powerful extra-dimensional forces, and even the super-dimensional realm did not dare to snatch them.

However, if he snatched it as another half-step extradimensional realm, even if he was discovered, he would not be able to find his head.

So, take a chance.

"As long as I snatch enough extradimensional origin beads, I can refine the superdimensional body and refine it to a hundred percent. "

Ye Tian kept inquiring about information, and finally had a goal.

Seven Thousand One Hundred and Six Territory, the three extra-dimensional realms of this territory have been arranged by a super-dimensional force, Tianjiao Pavilion, for cultivating super-dimensional origin beads.

Soon, Ye Tian rushed to the territory of Seven Hundred and Six, as a half-step transcendent realm.

This territory is not powerful, and there is no half-step extradimensional realm.

It's not that this territory can't give birth to a half-step extradimensional realm, but after a half-step extradimensional realm is born, they will choose to leave here.

All, many of the strongest people in the realm are peak realm gods, and unless they feel that there is no hope of improvement, they will stay in their own territory, otherwise they will go to the six thousand realm.

"Very good, there is no half-step extradimensional realm, it is more suitable for hands-on!"

Ye Tian entered one of the extra-dimensional realms of the origin, took a little time to find the formation, and after diving in, he really saw the super-dimensional origin bead.

"Two Extradimensional Origin Beads!"

He immediately took the two extradimensional origin beads away.

Subsequently, he went to the other two extradimensional realms and took five extradimensional origin beads.

Right now, he directly got his hands on the seven extra-dimensional origin beads.

In this way, one by one the superdimensional origin beads fell into Ye Tian's hands.

And Ye Tian did not send these extra-dimensional origin beads back to the 7,362 realm, but brought in the relics of the Kuntong Realm Lord, which was also the relics of the third realm super-dimensional realm.

In case the Corner Pavilion wanted to deduce from these extra-dimensional origin beads at any cost to find his traces, hiding here was undoubtedly the most appropriate.

Of course, if he had refined them all, then he wouldn't have to worry about the deduction of the Tianjiao Pavilion.

But for now, it's better to be careful. []

Refine!

Refine!

One after another, the super-dimensional origin beads were refined by Ye Tian, and time passed slowly.

Ten extradimensional epochs later.

Six Thousand Territory, Tianjiao Pavilion.

On this day, they sent a group of half-step extradimensional realms to take the Tianjiao Seventy-Seven treasure ship to the extradimensional realms of one superdimensional realm after another, to collect the extradimensional origin beads, and then bring them all back.

There was nothing dangerous about the mission, and it would have been very smooth.

But soon, a piece of news reached the Tianjiao Pavilion headquarters.

"Spirit Eye Realm Master, some of the Extradimensional Origin Beads of the Extradimensional Realm have been taken away!" a half-step Transcendent Realm was reporting to a Transcendent Realm in the Tianjiao Pavilion.

"What, who dares to snatch our Tianjiao Pavilion's extra-dimensional origin beads, and can't find death?"

The Spirit Eye Realm Lord was furious.

You must know that their Tianjiao Pavilion is also an extremely powerful extra-dimensional force, and the weak forces don't dare to take away those extra-dimensional origin beads at all, and the forces that are comparable to them can't look down on those super-dimensional origin beads!

Immediately, the Tianjiao Pavilion began to investigate.

In addition, those formations arranged by the Tianjiao Pavilion also have the effect of spying on the traces, and the enemy will definitely not dare to destroy the formation, otherwise the Tianjiao Pavilion will know about it immediately.

And Ye Tian's traces were naturally captured by these formations, but Ye Tian did not use his true identity.

After careful investigation, Tianjiao Pavilion found that the half-step extradimensional realm that stole the superdimensional origin bead was actually a half-step extradimensional realm that had fallen.

Obviously, the other party was disguised and did not reveal his true identity.

this day.

The Spirit Eye Realm Lord of Tianjiao Pavilion came to meet the Tianjiao Realm Lord, and he was also one of the several superdimensional realm powerhouses of the second realm of Tianjiao Pavilion, and he was also the founder of Tianjiao Pavilion.

"Tianjiao Realm Lord, there are thieves who steal our extra-dimensional origin beads, although that extra-dimensional origin bead is nothing, but if we don't deal with it, there will be more half-step extradimensional realms in the future who dare to do this, and it will also affect our reputation, I propose to use the Mixed Yuan Tianyang Disk to track the traces of the other party. "

"The other party has taken so many extra-dimensional origin beads, it is not necessary to use them, as long as there is one that has not been used, we can use the same origin to track down. The Spirit Eye Realm Lord suggested.

"Yes!"

The Celestial Horn Realm Lord agreed.
